Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Rita Interview 4 Comes in for exceptions If Mary cannot match or purchasing has issue missing info discrepancy that cannot be resolved escalates to Rita Rita tries to contact suppliers or coordinate between departments Sometimes invoices do not match any PO for services contracted informally work with department heads to create retrospective PO or decide to reject After clear up back to normal flow confirmation from Purchasing approval by Manager scheduling payment Does not do final approvals ensures problem invoices do not get stuck
